sections.paragraph:
- Original: δεῦρο

- Transliteration: Deuro

- Phonetic: dyoo'-ro

- Definition:

1. of place,

a. hither to this place

b. in urging and calling, here! come!

2. of time, hither to, now

- Origin: of uncertain affinity

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Of uncertain affinity; here; used also as an imperative hither!; and of time hitherto: - come (hither) hither [-to].
